generated_oml:
instance SensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Network of sensors collecting data from the Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensorNetwork
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw data collected from sensor networks of the Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, StateEstimatorEnabler, SupervisoryControllerEnabler, CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric representation of physical components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model described by differential equations for system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveSimulationEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, SupervisoryControllerEnabler, OptimizationEnabler, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based analytical model for simulations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveSimulationEnabler, OptimizationEnabler
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for monitoring system safety and performance using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance PredictiveSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for predictive simulations of Physical Twin behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance FaultDetectionAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system state using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for automated adjustments based on system state"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControllerService
]

instance OptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing system performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for calibrating model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationResult
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm that updates model parameters with best estimates using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance CalibratedModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calibrated model parameters for accurate simulations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveSimulationEnabler, OptimizationEnabler
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that checks system safety and optimal performance using sensor-collected data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolation, PerformanceOptimal
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for reproducing and forecasting Physical Twin behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ForecastedBehavior
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for detecting faults in the physical system"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for assessing system state using state estimation algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentStateEstimate
]

instance SupervisoryControllerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for making automated adjustments to system parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustSystemParameters
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for enhancing system performance through optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalConfiguration
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indication of a fault in the physical system"
]

instance SafetyViolation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System safety condition violated"
]

instance PerformanceOptimal : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System operating at optimal performance"
]

instance ForecastedBehavior : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted behavior of the Physical Twin based on simulations"
]

instance CurrentStateEstimate : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the system"
]

instance OptimalConfiguration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal configuration parameters for system performance"
]

instance AdjustSystemParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of system parameters to maintain safety and performance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ManualIntervention : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human decision to modify physical system in response to safety violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CalibrationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Result of model calibration process"
]
